signals.headline: Elon Musk # Tweets April 14-21 Market Hits 100% on 220-239 Range | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk # Tweets April 14-21 Market Hits 100% on 220-239 Range | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active market as of April 20 shows traders assigning **100% probability** to Elon Musk posting **220-239 tweets** in the April 14-21 period, up from 70% earlier and 86% in related updates, indicating strong consensus likely from confirmed tweet counts nearing resolution by April 21 end.[3

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending Hot on X | YES | MED confidence**

Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending Hot on X | YES | MED confidence**  
Traders on Polymarket (and implied X buzz via pop culture focus) are heavily posting about overlapping **Elon Musk tweet volume markets**, including extensions like April 20-22 at 66% for 40-64 tweets, signaling active discussion on **mispriced short-term ranges** as daily data emerges.[4][2] No explicit whale bets or tips
